## TRM1.5. Vertical flight efficiency of the climb (PI#8) {#trm1.5.-vertical-flight-efficiency-of-the-climb-pi8 .Heading-2-TZ}

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (34.8 seconds per flight), average times flown level during climb are on average 14.1 seconds per flight lower in Portugal. The highest average time flown level during climb happens at Porto (LPPR) (51.6 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Ponta Delgada (LPPD) (3.7 seconds per flight).
